trades.reasoning: Score-95 semiconductor name with AI data-center tailwinds; MACD bullish crossover, histogram rising, and RSI 55.3 in the ideal momentum entry zone — all three signals aligned.
Score-95 fintech with RSI 66.8 at the top of the bullish zone and all momentum signals firing; deploying idle cash into a high-scoring slot while market is only mildly negative.

decisions.briefing: Markets slipped modestly today — NASDAQ -0.7%, S&P 500 -0.5% — a soft neutral session rather than a true risk-off move. No existing positions appear near their stop-loss or profit-target thresholds, so the book stays intact. With four open slots and over $800 in idle cash, I'm deploying into MRVL (AI semiconductor, all signals aligned) and SEZL (fintech momentum) to reduce cash drag rather than sit on dead weight.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities pulled back modestly on Tuesday, with the S&P 500 losing 0.5% and the NASDAQ falling 0.7%, as investors digested lingering uncertainty around interest rate policy and mixed corporate earnings signals. The sell-off was broad but shallow, suggesting profit-taking rather than a decisive shift in sentiment. Defensive and value names held up relatively better than high-growth tech, keeping the day's tone 'neutral' rather than outright bearish.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市周二小幅回落，標普500指數跌0.5%，納斯達克指數跌0.7%，市場在消化利率政策不確定性與企業業績訊號之際維持觀望情緒。跌勢雖屬廣泛，但幅度溫和，更像是獲利了結，而非趨勢性轉弱。防禦型及價值股表現相對抗跌，令整體市場氣氛維持「中性」基調，並未陷入明確的看空格局。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash drag refers to the performance cost of holding uninvested cash in a portfolio. While cash feels 'safe,' it earns near-zero returns — so every dollar sitting idle is a dollar that isn't compounding. In an actively managed portfolio, the goal is to deploy cash into high-conviction ideas promptly, which is why today's two buys were prioritized despite a mildly negative market.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「現金拖累」（Cash Drag）是指投資組合中持有閒置現金所帶來的績效損失。現金雖然感覺安全，但回報接近零，每一分閒置資金都是放棄複利增長的機會。在主動管理的組合中，目標是將現金迅速部署到高信念的投資標的，這正是今天即使市場輕微下跌仍選擇進行兩筆買入的原因。
